Good Times
Who I Am

About Me

Fueled by curiosity, ambition, and big dreams — constantly building, learning, and chasing what's next. A creator passionate about technology, meaningful ideas, story-driven games, anime, and the moments that bring balance beyond the screen.

I thrive at the intersection of code and creativity, turning complex problems into elegant solutions and ambitious ideas into working realities. Every project I touch is a chance to grow, and every challenge is a reason to push harder.

"Every great developer you know got there by solving problems they were unqualified to solve — until they did."

My Story

How It All Started

My journey began with curiosity — a deep desire to understand how technology works and how ideas can be turned into reality. What started as simply learning to code soon became a burning passion for building, solving problems, and constantly exploring new possibilities.

From experimenting with small projects late at night to chasing bigger ambitions with every new skill learned — every single step has shaped my growth, strengthened my craft, and brought me closer to creating something truly meaningful.

Today, that curious kid who once typed his first line of code is a developer who builds with purpose, thinks like an entrepreneur, and dreams without limits.

Currently

Based in Chennai · Interning at Psiog Digital · Open to exciting opportunities and collaborations.

Education & Career

My Timeline

2020
SSLC — Class 10th
Mount Mary Hr. Sec. School, Salem

Completed my Secondary School Leaving Certificate with a strong foundation in science and mathematics — the first chapter of a long learning journey.

2023
Diploma in Computer Engineering
Thiagarajar Polytechnic College, Salem

Completed my Diploma in Computer Engineering — where curiosity about technology turned into real, hands-on technical skills. This is where the developer in me truly began.

2026
B.Tech in Information Technology
PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore

Completed my B.Tech in Information Technology from one of Tamil Nadu's most prestigious institutions. Four years of building, learning, and growing into a full-stack developer.

NOW
Software Development Intern
Psiog Digital

Currently interning at Psiog Digital — applying my skills in a real-world environment, learning from industry professionals, and contributing to meaningful digital products.

My Foundation

The People Behind Me

Every dream I chase, every line of code I write, every milestone I reach — it's all powered by a family of four whose love and belief in me have never wavered. They are not just my support system; they are my reason.

👨
Father
Fruit Business Owner · The Backbone

My father runs a fruit business, and through his daily dedication he has taught me the real meaning of hard work, patience, and perseverance. His entrepreneurial spirit quietly ignited mine — long before I even knew what entrepreneurship meant.

👩
Mother
Homemaker · The Pillar

My mother has always been a strong pillar of support and encouragement. On every difficult day, she reminded me to keep going. Her unconditional belief in me is the quiet strength behind everything I do — and everything I will do.

👧
Sister
Younger Sibling · The Motivator

My younger sister is a constant source of motivation and energy. Her spirit pushes me to be a better version of myself every single day — someone she can look up to, and someone who makes this family proud together.
